title: Why SAP Developers Should Build a Personal Brand
content: A strong personal brand helps SAP professionals stand out in interviews, consulting projects and community conversations. Share what you learn, build clarity around your point of view and stay consistent.
excerpt: A practical guide to building influence and trust inside the SAP ecosystem.

title: How to Structure Your SAP Learning Roadmap
content: The best SAP roadmap is practical and focused. Start with core ABAP, move into RAP and CDS, then deepen your understanding of OData, performance and integrations.
excerpt: A roadmap that helps you build momentum from foundational ABAP to modern S/4HANA skills.
